asset.identityPolicy: Only an original fictional adult woman is permitted. Do not name, imitate, or imply any real person.

details: A continuous deep-cobalt and violet cosmic stage fills the complete canvas.
The left 52 percent remains low-detail and dark enough for native Codex content.
The original fictional adult woman, hand, hair, dress, butterflies, and strongest aurora remain in the right crop-safe zone.
No text, window chrome, cards, buttons, badges, or composer are baked into the wallpaper.
A real horizontal Codex brand row sits above the hero copy.
The square brand mark uses cyan, violet, and pink light with a small star glyph.
Brand name, theme meta, and online status remain native text with truncation protection.
A thin cyan-to-pink light trail visually links the row without moving layout.
The main title remains a real H1 and stays on one horizontal line at desktop widths.
The title uses a restrained Chinese serif stack, pearl-white text, violet glow, and a thin aurora underline.
The supporting line is short, readable, and left aligned inside the wallpaper safe area.
At compact widths the title may wrap naturally rather than overflow or overlap the subject.
Sparse cyan, violet, pink, and white star points are rendered as non-interactive decoration.
The existing motif node becomes a two-wing iridescent butterfly built from CSS layers.
Decorations use pointer-events none and never intercept Codex controls.
The effect is reduced to a static state when reduced motion is requested.
Exactly four real button cards are shown in one desktop row.
Each card contains the runtime icon, native title, prompt summary, index, and action indicator.
Cards use solid dark-indigo surfaces with cyan, violet, and pink highlights; text is never placed on transparent wallpaper.
Compact widths use a stable 2 by 2 grid with no card-local scrollbar.
The existing Codex sidebar receives a deep-indigo continuous surface, sparse star points, and one luminous boundary line.
Native search, new-task, navigation, project, task, active-state, and account rows are preserved.
Project and task rows remain single scrolling content inside the main sidebar scroll container.
Rows never receive independent overflow modules, steppers, arrows, or scrollbars.
The existing native Codex composer is decorated in place and is never replaced or duplicated.
Inputs remain editable, model and attachment controls remain native, and the send action retains its event listener.
The composer uses an opaque indigo surface, a cyan-violet-pink light rail, and a high-contrast send control.
Decorative pseudo-elements stay behind interactive content.
Menus, listboxes, Popovers, commands, settings, dialogs, project menus, and rename dialogs use fully opaque dark surfaces.
Code blocks, Diff views, terminals, and Monaco surfaces use solid near-black backgrounds.
Image preview keeps a solid near-black overlay and equal 44 by 44 download and close actions with equal 22 by 22 icons.
No generic transparent rule is allowed to leak into settings, dialogs, menus, code, or image preview controls.

copy.title: 我们该构建什么？
copy.subtitle: 让灵感穿过星夜，把下一段代码写得清晰可靠。
copy.composerPlaceholder: 随心输入，让灵感陪你一起写代码。

cards.title: 探索并理解代码
cards.description: 绘制模块、调用链与风险区域。
cards.prompt: 绘制项目的代码星图。请梳理核心模块、调用链和高风险区域，指出最佳切入点。

cards.title: 构建新功能或工具
cards.description: 把闪光想法落成可靠功能。
cards.prompt: 把闪光想法落成可靠功能。请完成设计、实现、测试和边界验证。

cards.title: 审查代码并提出建议
cards.description: 沿实现轨迹检查缺陷与回归。
cards.prompt: 沿着实现轨迹检查风险。请审查缺陷、回归点、性能问题和缺失测试。

cards.title: 修复问题和失败
cards.description: 定位暗处问题并补齐验证。
cards.prompt: 找出藏在暗处的问题。请复现故障、定位根因并完成可靠修复。

accessibility.windowControls: Use Codex dark appearance so native Windows caption glyphs remain visible.

requiredTests: all theme selectors are scoped to ink-night
background, surface, and muted text pass dark contrast thresholds
exactly four real quick-card definitions exist
compact renders a stable 2 by 2 card grid
title is horizontal on desktop and wraps on compact widths
cards and sidebar rows do not create local scrollbars
menus, Popovers, settings, dialogs, code, Monaco, and image preview controls remain opaque
manualRegression: click every quick card and confirm the native composer receives the prompt
scroll the sidebar while the pointer is over a project or task row
open model menu and attachment Popover
open settings and its confirmation dialog
open project rename, archive, and remove flows
open code, Diff, terminal, and Monaco surfaces
open an image and compare download and close action geometry
check Windows minimize, maximize, and close contrast after restarting Codex
repeat at desktop, compact, 16:10, 4:3, and ultrawide dimensions

notes: The Rust runtime must load this stylesheet after its base theme CSS.
Theme copy may be mapped into the existing ink-night showcase fields during integration.
No new wallpaper or portrait asset is required for this slice.
